$comment: c20 (D-CSUBSET-ADJACENT-STRING-CONCAT) byte-level pin: `puts("\x41" "1")` → "A1". Each body is escape-decoded (phase 5) BEFORE the bytes are joined (phase 6): \x41→'A', then '1'. A raw-token merge would form \x411 (one byte 0x11) and print a control char. exit 0; stdout "A1" (+ CRT \r\n on PE, \n elsewhere). Modeled on shipped_include_puts + decl_string_global's release arm.
